'''vashama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickellotharmeyerite|nickellotharmeyerite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickellotharmeyerite|nickellotharmeyerite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vashama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væshæmæth|væshæmæth]] || [[word:væshæmæj|væshæmæj]] || [[word:væshæmæsh|væshæmæsh]] || [[word:væshæmæ|væshæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashashamath|vashashamath]] || [[word:vashashamaj|vashashamaj]] || [[word:vashashamash|vashashamash]] || [[word:vashashama|vashashama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashamath|vashamath]] || [[word:vashamaj|vashamaj]] || [[word:vashamash|vashamash]] || [[word:vashama|vashama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashafmath|vashafmath]] || [[word:vashafmaj|vashafmaj]] || [[word:vashafmash|vashafmash]] || [[word:vashafmaf|vashafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashamatha|vashamatha]] || [[word:vashamaja|vashamaja]] || [[word:vashamasha|vashamasha]] || [[word:vashamaka|vashamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashamath|vashamath]] || [[word:vashamaj|vashamaj]] || [[word:vashamash|vashamash]] || [[word:vashama|vashama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashamathal|vashamathal]] || [[word:vashamajal|vashamajal]] || [[word:vashamashal|vashamashal]] || [[word:vashamakal|vashamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashamathatha|vashamathatha]] || [[word:vashamajaja|vashamajaja]] || [[word:vashamashasha|vashamashasha]] || [[word:vashamaka|vashamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashamathan|vashamathan]] || [[word:vashamajan|vashamajan]] || [[word:vashamashan|vashamashan]] || [[word:vashamakan|vashamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashamathaoro|vashamathaoro]] || [[word:vashamajaoro|vashamajaoro]] || [[word:vashamashaoro|vashamashaoro]] || [[word:vashamakaoro|vashamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
